creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194457
p5-Cisco-UCS-0.51.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates comms/p5-Cisco-UCS to 0.51 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/Cisco-UCS

Changes to the port:
- removed BUILD_DEPENDS (it's not required for a successful build)
- set RUN_DEPENDS accordingly for the given requirements
- added NO_ARCH
- fixed some typos in pkg-descr
- updated pkg-plist

QA:
~~~
poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) -> OK
portlint -> OK
